posts.author: VijayNair
posts.text: Giorgia Meloni has a "Melody" Twist — Almost as funny as this The shares of Parle Industries on Tuesday hit the upper circuit at 5 per cent to Rs 5.25 per piece after Prime Minister Narendra Modi gifted a packet of Melody toffees to Italian PM Giorgia Meloni during his visit to Italy, a video of which, has gone viral. However, Parle Industries has nothing to do with Parle Products (brand owner of the said chocolates) The Hindu – 20 May 26 Parle Industries up 5% after investors mistake it for the Melody owner Parle Industries shares rise 5% after investors confuse it with Parle Products, known…

posts.author: neha1101
posts.text: Giorgia Meloni has a "Melody" Twist — The Times of India Watch: PM Modi's surprise gift for Giorgia Meloni has a very 'Melody' twist Thank you for the gift pic.twitter.com/7ePxbJwPbA The best news I have read. Who ever came out with this idea at our PM Staff/office need to be congratulated… Just wonderful…Makes me smile… Waiting for the Classic Amul to come out with their outstanding clip on this topic… Parle the makers must be super elated by this free advertisement…
